title: Web Developer
description: Developed and maintained healthcare-related web applications in a small team, on systems that grew significantly in complexity and number over time.
bullets: Identified the growing need for quality gates and structured testing as the codebase scaled
Experienced first-hand how complexity without quality gates leads to fragile systems — and became the person pushing to fix that

title: Totara Developer
description: Built and customised LMS platforms for enterprise clients using Totara in a fast-paced consulting environment.
bullets: Delivered client-facing features across multiple concurrent projects under tight deadlines
Worked in a largely self-directed way with minimal QA process — which later shaped my appreciation for structured quality practices
Gained early exposure to enterprise-scale software delivery and client requirements
